action_scenario: walking through an autumn park with leaves on the ground, full-body candid photograph

base.prompt: A photographic, candid, head-and-shoulders portrait of a fictional man in their early thirties, of Middle Eastern descent, with salt-and-pepper hair and light blue eyes, a calm, neutral expression. soft daylight from a north-facing window. a softly lit gray studio backdrop. Realistic skin texture, natural pores, no makeup, no glasses, no jewelry, no text, no watermark, sharp focus on the face. This is a fictional character — do not generate a real or named person.

lookalikes.prompt: A male-presenting individual in their 40s with olive skin, walking through an autumn park with leaves on the ground, a full-body candid photograph. A neatly trimmed goatee outlines his chin. His expression is thoughtful, looking slightly to the side. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
